description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named BuildSharedLibrary that runs on push to master, develop, actions_shared branches and tags matching v*, and on pull requests to master and develop. Use a matrix job that runs on windows-latest, ubuntu-latest, and macOS-latest, checking out the repository with submodules, setting up Python 3.x, installing dependencies, extracting the CoolProp version, configuring CMake, building the shared library, and archiving the artifacts.
